JOIN cars_data cd ON ml.Model = cd.Id
WHERE cd.Year = 1970;

JOIN model_list ml ON cm.Id = ml.Maker
JOIN car_names cn ON ml.Model = cn.Model

question: Among the cars with more than lowest horsepower, which ones do not have more than 3 cylinders? List the car makeid and make name.

reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_contract:
SELECT MakeId, Make
FROM car_names
WHERE MakeId NOT IN (
    SELECT MakeId
    FROM cars_data
    WHERE Horsepower > (SELECT MIN(Horsepower) FROM cars_data)
    AND Cylinders > 3
);
reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_oneshot:
SELECT cm.MakeId, cm.Make
FROM car_names cm
JOIN cars_data cd ON cm.MakeId = cd.Id
WHERE cd.Horsepower > (SELECT MIN(Horsepower) FROM cars_data)
  AND cd.Cylinders <= 3;

final_sql:
SELECT cm.MakeId, cm.Make
FROM car_names cm
JOIN cars_data cd ON cm.MakeId = cd.Id
WHERE cd.Horsepower > (SELECT MIN(Horsepower) FROM cars_data)
  AND cd.Cylinders <= 3;

question: What are the different models wthat are lighter than 3500 but were not built by the Ford Motor Company?

question: What are the id and names of the countries which have more than 3 car makers or produce the 'fiat' model?

reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_contract:
SELECT DISTINCT c.CountryId, c.CountryName
FROM countries c
JOIN car_makers cm ON c.CountryId = cm.Country
JOIN model_list ml ON cm.Id = ml.Maker
WHERE cm.Country IN (
    SELECT cm.Country
    FROM car_makers cm
    GROUP BY cm.Country
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
)
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT c.CountryId, c.CountryName
FROM countries c
JOIN car_makers cm ON c.CountryId = cm.Country
JOIN model_list ml ON cm.Id = ml.Maker
WHERE LOWER(ml.Model) = 'fiat';
reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_oneshot:
SELECT c.CountryId, c.CountryName
FROM countries c
JOIN car_makers cm ON c.CountryId = cm.Country
JOIN model_list ml ON cm.Id = ml.Maker
WHERE cm.Country IN (
    SELECT Country
    FROM car_makers
    GROUP BY Country
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Maker) > 3
)
OR ml.Model = 'fiat'
GROUP BY c.CountryId, c.CountryName;

final_sql:
SELECT c.CountryId, c.CountryName
FROM countries c
JOIN car_makers cm ON c.CountryId = cm.Country
JOIN model_list ml ON cm.Id = ml.Maker
WHERE cm.Country IN (
    SELECT Country
    FROM car_makers
    GROUP BY Country
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Maker) > 3
)
OR ml.Model = 'fiat'
GROUP BY c.CountryId, c.CountryName;
